goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 20:30' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should depart from 'bishops stortford' and should leave on 'thursday'.
Make sure you get 'departure time', 'travel time', and 'train ID'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college' and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 20:30 and should go to cambridge
The train should depart from bishops stortford and should leave on thursday
Make sure you get departure time, travel time, and train ID
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college and should be in the centre
Make sure you get phone number
